hintDisplay: Sujeto: el pintor / Verbo: abandonar (condicional perfecto negativo) / Complemento: su pasatiempo / Verbo: pintar (condicional perfecto) / Complemento: muchas más obras maestras

correctSentence: If the painter had not abandoned his hobby, he would have painted many more masterpieces.

correctSentence: If the musician had tuned the guitar before the concert, the performance would have sounded much better.

correctSentence: If I had practiced drawing more regularly, I would have become a professional artist by now.

correctSentence: If they hadn't neglected their practice, they would have performed better at the competition.

correctSentence: If the painter had blended the colors more carefully, the painting would have looked much better.

correctSentence: If the gardener had not forgotten to water the plants, they would not have died.
